arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Benjamin Sesko dilemma as Real Madrid make William Saliba plan
arts.sum: Arsenal have just over two weeks to make new singings before the January transfer window slams shut and RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko has been tipped for a mega £70million move

arts.ttl: Supercomputer predicts Premier League title race after Arsenal slip up against Aston Villa
arts.sum: A supercomputer predicts the winners of the Premier League title after Arsenal's draw with Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's draw with Aston Villa highlighted one glaringly obvious flaw that WILL cost Gunners the Premier League title, writes DANNY MURPHY - and it's NOT their lack of a top striker
arts.sum: DANNY MURPHY: The tension even filtered its way to Mikel Arteta who has been less excitable on the touchline in general this season but reverted to type as his side lost their way at the Emirates.

arts.ttl: William Saliba injury update: Mikel Arteta reveals next steps as defender misses Aston Villa draw
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta provides an injury update on Arsenal centre-back William Saliba, who was absent for his side's 2-2 draw with Aston Villa on Saturday evening.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'can't concede silly goals like that' - MOTD analysis
arts.sum: Arsenal back line has "problems" - Match Of The Day pundit Ashley Williams talks about Arsenal's "worrying" point drops.

arts.ttl: How Liverpool's next five fixtures compare to Arsenal's
arts.sum: How Liverpool's next five Premier League fixtures compare to title rivals Arsenal's upcoming matches.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer latest: Why Gunners must spend in January window to Mikel Arteta deal with injury crisis
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta admits his Arsenal side is struggling to cope with the loss of key players to injury, and hints that he will need reinforcements in the January window.

arts.ttl: Arsenal misfit told he's 'lost the crowd' after display in Aston Villa draw
arts.sum: Arsenal threw away a two-goal lead against Aston Villa on Saturday, denting their Premier League title hopes and seeing star Raheem Sterling come in for more criticism

arts.ttl: Arsenal weigh up £70m Sesko move - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Arsenal consider a £70m move for striker Benjamin Sesko, Dele Alli is poised to move to Italy, AC Milan's interest in Kyle Walker is confirmed, plus more.

arts.ttl: Lens near agreement to sign former Arsenal and Brighton goalkeeper Mathew Ryan
arts.sum: Lens are nearing an agreement to sign Australia international goalkeeper Mathew Ryan (32), according to a report from L’Equipe. Will Still’s Artois side were in the market for a goalkeeper…
